page: Google Cloud Platform n4a-standard-1 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the n4a server family. It features 1 dedicated vCPU based on the x86_64 architecture and is equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory. This configuration provides a balanced 1:4 ratio of vCPU to RAM, which is standard for general-purpose computing workloads.

This server type does not include local NVMe SSD storage or bundled GPU accelerators, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external block storage options. Additionally, it does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its single dedicated vCPU and 4.0 GB memory capacity, the n4a-standard-1 is designed for lightweight, entry-level workloads. It is suitable for running small web servers, microservices, development environments, and basic background tasks. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable performance for these workloads compared to shared-core alternatives, offering a cost-efficient entry point for applications requiring stable, non-burstable compute resources.
description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-standard-1 is an entry-level, general-purpose virtual machine within the n4a server family. It is configured with 1 dedicated vCPU utilizing the x86_64 architecture and 4.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage for its disk requirements. With its dedicated CPU allocation, the n4a-standard-1 offers predictable performance without the resource contention typical of shared-core environments. This server is designed for lightweight applications, including microservices, small web servers, development environments, and basic background processing tasks, providing a stable and cost-efficient resource profile for entry-level cloud deployments.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-standard-1 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 1 dedicated x86_64 vCPU and 4.0 GB of RAM. It is designed for lightweight, predictable workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-standard-1 is a general-purpose VM with 1 dedicated x86_64 vCPU and 4.0 GB of RAM, ideal for lightweight workloads.
tagline: A dedicated single-core virtual machine with balanced memory for lightweight, predictable, and cost-efficient general-purpose workloads.

Dedicated CPU allocation for predictable performance
